tools.description: Show working-tree status — branch, revision, changes, ahead/behind.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

tools.description: Retrieve metadata about a repository (name, URL, default branch, creator).

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

repository_url.description: URL of the repository to query; leave empty to use the current repository.

tools.description: List all repositories available at a remote URL.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

url.description: The lore:// URL to query for available repositories.

tools.description: Show revision history for the current branch or a specified revision.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

revision.description: Start from this revision; empty for current.

branch.description: Restrict to this branch; empty for current.

date.description: Stop at revisions created before this Unix timestamp; 0 disables.

length.description: Maximum number of revisions to return; 0 for unlimited.

only_branch.description: Stop when reaching a different branch.

tools.description: Show file-level differences between two revisions.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

revision_target.description: Revision to diff to; empty for current working state.

paths.description: Restrict diff to these repository-relative paths; empty for all files.

tools.description: Show metadata and file changes for a revision.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

revision.description: Revision to inspect; empty for current.

delta.description: Include per-file changes against the parent revision.

tools.description: Find revisions by metadata key/value or revision number, searching local and remote stores.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

key.description: Search by this metadata key (e.g. 'tag', 'author'). Leave empty to search by revision number.

value.description: Match this value for the given key.

number.description: Search by revision number when key is empty.

tools.description: List all branches in the repository, optionally including archived branches.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

archived.description: When enabled, archived branches are included in the listing.

tools.description: Show metadata for a branch — name, category, parent, creator, timestamps, and archive state.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

branch.description: Branch name; leave empty for the current branch.

tools.description: Show metadata for files — size, hash, flags, and staging status.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: Repository-relative paths to query (one per line).

revision.description: Revision specifier to query (leave empty for working copy).

local.description: Calculate the filtered local filesystem hash and size.

tools.description: Show the revision history of a single file.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

revision.description: Optional revision to start from; empty for current.

branch.description: Restrict history to this branch; empty for current.

length.description: Number of revisions to list (0 = default 100).

tools.description: Compute unified diff between two revisions.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: File paths to diff; empty diffs all changed files.

diff3.description: Produce three-way merge output with conflict markers.

context_lines.description: Number of unchanged context lines per hunk.

ignore_whitespace_eol.description: Treat lines that differ only in trailing whitespace as equal.

ignore_whitespace_inline.description: Collapse runs of internal whitespace to a single space for comparison.

tools.description: List file locks on a branch, optionally filtered by owner or path.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

branch.description: Branch to query locks on; leave empty for current branch.

owner.description: Filter by lock owner; leave empty for all owners.

path.description: Filter by path prefix; leave empty for all paths.

tools.description: Check the lock status of one or more files — shows owner and lock time.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: File paths to check, one per line.

branch.description: Branch to check locks on; leave empty for current branch.

tools.description: Commit the staged changes with a message.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

tools.description: Create a new branch, optionally under a category and with an explicit branch id.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

branch.description: Name of the branch to create.

id.description: Optional explicit branch id (hex-encoded 16-byte context); leave empty to auto-generate.

tools.description: Switch the working tree to a different branch.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

branch.description: Name of the branch to switch to.

tools.description: Stage one or more paths for the next commit.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

tools.description: Remove one or more paths from the staged changeset.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: One path per line to unstage.

tools.description: Acquire exclusive locks on one or more files for the current user.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: File paths to lock, one per line.

branch.description: Branch to acquire locks on; leave empty for current branch.

tools.description: Release exclusive file locks for the specified paths.

repo.description: Path to the lore repository working directory. Overrides the LORE_REPO env var for this call.

paths.description: File paths to unlock, one per line.

branch.description: Branch the locks were acquired on; leave empty for current branch.
